allow: Bash(python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; from pathlib import Path; load_dotenv\(Path\(''.env''\)\); import os; k=os.getenv\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY''\); print\(''len:'', len\(k\) if k else None\); print\(''startswith:'', k[:20] if k else None\); print\(''has_angle:'', ''<'' in \(k or ''''\) or ''>'' in \(k or ''''\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import os; v=os.environ.get\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY''\); print\(''system env var:'', repr\(v\)\)")
